summary: Focused regression test on the reported bug (single tap on lock icon must open Ateliê login sheet). Bug is FIXED and verified. All 5 requested items pass: (1) single page.click on testID='atelie-access-button' opens the 'Acesso do Ateliê' bottom sheet with usuario/senha fields; (2) no long-press required; (3) login with douglasfurlani/Dfc160201 navigates to Ateliê — 'Painel' is visible and all 6 bottom tabs are present (tab-dashboard, tab-catalogo, tab-estoque, tab-pedidos, tab-opinioes, tab-mensagens); (4) Vitrine shows real perfumes — first card is 'Ab Autentica' Nº 001 (not TEST_), and Ateliê Dashboard reports 418 Contratipos; (5) sugestao-fab is visible and rendered on the Vitrine.

issues: All 418 perfumes render with price R$ 0,00 and 'em falta' status — not part of the bug scope, but worth confirming with product owner if seed data prices/availability should be non-zero.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/Vitrine.tsx:277 (fabSuggestion uses shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset). Consider migrating to boxShadow for react-native-web compatibility.

action_items: Optional: update /app/memory/test_credentials.md — it still instructs to 'Toque e segure (long-press ~0.8s)'. After the fix, a simple tap opens the sheet; docs should be corrected.
Optional cleanup: migrate deprecated shadow* style props to boxShadow in Vitrine.tsx (fabSuggestion) to silence the RN Web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Vitrine.tsx: Pressable now uses onPress={onAtelieClick} with hitSlop={12} — correct fix. testID present.
app/index.tsx LoginForm handles trim() on usuario, sets error state, disables submit while loading — behaviour is correct.
seed_data_creation: None. Verified existing snapshot returns 418 real perfumes (first item 'Ab Autentica' Nº 001, second 'Af Fierce') and no TEST_ leftovers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fix (onLongPress -> onPress on testID='atelie-access-button') is verified via mobile viewport (375x667). Full flow Vitrine → tap lock → login → Ateliê Painel with 6 tabs works. Backend was not tested this iteration per request.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: the lock icon used onLongPress with delayLongPress=800ms, so a normal tap never triggered the handler. Fix (already applied by main agent) is to use onPress. Verified with Playwright single click — sheet opens immediately.
